layer_plan.reason: atomicity route is single-atomic-PR (not split-PR); plan-layers.sh not run per autopilot step 8d

hazard_route.implication: Markers MUST be emitted as an ORDERED STACK (marker B based on marker A), never independent parallel PRs — the global schema-version pin (CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION 7->8) lands exactly once, in marker A.

markers.title: Slice A — endpoint embedding on full index (US1: config, provider, client, migration v8, embed pass in indexAll, dims, status, progress)
Slice B — incremental + healing (US2+US3: input_hash incremental sync, reconciliation delete, daemon/watcher, sync-heal backfill, abort/resume) + polish

warnings: Full-diff totals exceed block thresholds; the 2 ordered markers keep each reviewable unit near the plan's projected ~500 (Slice A) / ~250 (Slice B) production LOC.
Emission must be stacked (M2 PR based on M1), honoring the hard-atomic global-version-pin signal.
